title.v: Vào số dư đầu kỳ hợp đồng

subTitle.v: &SubTitleBalance.v;Cập nhật thông tin: thêm, sửa, xóa...

grid.commands:
&SubTitleBalanceShowing;
&CreateTicket; declare @message nvarchar(4000), @$lockedDate nvarchar(512) select @message = 'this._authorize = ' + rtrim(@@sysDatabaseName.dbo.FastBusiness$System$GetAuthorize(@@admin, @@userID, 'ContractBalance', 'New')) + ';this._key = ''' + @ticket + ''';load$Grid(this);' select @$lockedDate = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Đã khóa số liệu, kiểm tra lại ngày khóa sổ.' else N'Data is locked, you must modify system locked date.' end if exists(select 1 from dmstt where year(ngay_ks) >= nam_bd) begin select 'this._denyNew = true;this._denyEdit = true;this._denyDelete = true;this._denyMessage=''' + @$lockedDate + '''; ' + @message as message return end if exists(select 1 from dmdvcsks where ma_dvcs = @@unit and year(ngay_ks) >= (select nam_bd from dmstt)) begin select 'this._denyNew = true;this._denyEdit = true;this._denyDelete = true;this._denyMessage=''' + @$lockedDate + ''';' + @message as message return end #IF @@admin <> 1 #THEN if not exists(select 1 from sysunitrights where user_id = @@userID and ma_dvcs = @@unit and r_new = 1) begin select 'this._denyNew = true;' + @message as message return end #END
select @message as message return
select 'dispose$Grid(this);' as message return
